name: Metropolitan Bank Holding Corp.
business: Through its wholly owned bank subsidiary, Metropolitan Commercial Bank, a New York state-chartered commercial bank, the Company provides a broad range of business, commercial and retail banking products and services to small businesses, middle-market enterprises, public entities and individuals primarily in the New York metropolitan area.

exposures.sentence: We have made, and expect to continue making, investments in the integration of AI in our platform, products, and services, as we expect that we will need to integrate AI into our business to remain competitive.

catalysts.event: Open a banking center in West Palm Beach, Florida
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, in the second quarter of 2026 we plan to open a banking center in West Palm Beach, Florida.
